parameters.value: ={{ JSON.stringify({ inline_keyboard: [ [{ text: '✅ Approve & publish', callback_data: 'approve' }], [{ text: '🖼 Regenerate image', callback_data: 'regen_image' }], [{ text: '📝 Regenerate text', callback_data: 'regen_text' }], [{ text: '🔁 Regenerate both', callback_data: 'regen_both' }], [{ text: '✏️ Edit text manually', callback_data: 'edit_text' }], [{ text: '📷 Replace image', callback_data: 'replace_image' }] ] }) }}

' + ($json.feedback ? 'Reviewer hint: ' + $json.feedback + '. ' : '') + 'Keep language=' + $json.language + ', perspective=' + $json.perspective + '. Output ONLY the post — no commentary.' }] }) }}
